title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
